pg-cron-scheduler-validator.evidence: cron.job row confirmed: jobname='feed-orchestrator-hourly', schedule='0 * * * *'. Verified via MCP execute_sql on project rumdmulxzmjtsplsjngi.

feed-pipeline-checker.evidence: public.data_feeds table created via migration 20260312170001. 39 feed rows seeded via 20260312170002 across 11 categories (trade_pub, regulatory, academic, social, jobs, events, ingredients, brand_news, press_release, association, market_data). All is_enabled=false — admin toggles ON from /admin/feeds. Feed-orchestrator responds to dry_run: {ok:true, processed:0, message:'No enabled feeds to process'}.

notes: feed-orchestrator correctly returns 'No enabled feeds' when all feeds are disabled. Admin must toggle is_enabled=true per feed from /admin/feeds to activate ingestion. Previous pg_cron schedules from migrations 20260309100002 and 20260310000002 (local-only, never pushed) are now replaced by this correctly-pushed migration.
